agent_scopes.mechanism: project scope (.github/agents/ or .claude/agents/), personal (~/.copilot/agents/), plugin (agents/); personal takes precedence over project

definition_format.mechanism: .agent.md files with YAML frontmatter (description required); up to 30,000 chars of Markdown instructions as agent system prompt

invocation_patterns.mechanism: /agent slash command, natural language instruction, auto-inference (suppressible with disable-model-invocation), or --agent flag; 4 patterns

model_selection.mechanism: model field in frontmatter overrides default model for that agent

per_agent_mcp.mechanism: mcp-servers inline config in frontmatter; available for cloud agent only; workspace MCP config shared by default

subagent_spawning.mechanism: agents run as subagents with isolated context windows; Git-SHA-based versioning ensures consistency across PR interactions

tool_restrictions.mechanism: tools field with cross-provider alias system (execute/shell/Bash, read/Read, edit/Edit, etc.); ["*"] grants all tools; unrecognized names silently ignored

providerExtensions.name: Agent Profile File Format
providerExtensions.summary: Agents are .agent.md files with YAML frontmatter (description required) plus up to 30,000 chars of Markdown instructions as the system prompt.

providerExtensions.name: Project and Personal Agent Scopes
providerExtensions.summary: Agents can live at project scope (.github/agents/, .claude/agents/) or personal scope (~/.copilot/agents/), with personal taking precedence on conflict.

providerExtensions.name: Multiple Agent Invocation Modes
providerExtensions.summary: Agents are invoked four ways: /agent slash command, natural language instruction, auto-inference, or --agent CLI flag.

providerExtensions.name: Cross-Provider Tool Aliases
providerExtensions.summary: The tools field accepts case-insensitive aliases (execute/shell/Bash, read/Read, edit/Edit/Write, etc.); unknown names are silently ignored for portability.

providerExtensions.name: Subagent Execution Model
providerExtensions.summary: Delegated agents run as subagents with isolated context windows; Git-SHA-based versioning pins the active profile for a task's lifetime.
